benefits.description: Down nearly 60 pounds and within sight of goal weight
BPC157 helped with tendon and muscle injuries

protocol_notes: Has diagnosed mitochondrial dysfunction with cyclical functional and crash periods. Currently awaiting MOTS-C delivery. Non-peptide protocol includes Prednisone 5mg 3x/day, Amino Energy drink 3 scoops AM and lunch, T3 hormone 4x/day, electrolytes, methylated B vitamins, and high protein diet. Notes batch-to-batch variability with BPC157 between vendors. Endo recommended one change at a time.
